questions.context_sentence: Around 2.8 billion people speak the six official languages of the United Nations.
questions.cn: 全球大约有28亿人使用联合国的六种官方语言。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：b (billion) 与 m (million，百万) 相对，b代表十亿，数字更大。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Around 2.8 ____ people speak the six official languages of the United Nations. (提示: 十亿)

questions.context_sentence: Around 2.8 billion people speak the six official languages of the United Nations.
questions.cn: 全球大约有28亿人使用联合国的六种官方语言。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：b (billion) 与 m (million，百万) 相对，b代表十亿，数字更大。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“n. 十亿”对应的英文单词：

questions.meaning: adj. 出生地的；本地的；土著的 n. 本地人
questions.context_sentence: Chinese has the largest number of native speakers, over one billion people.
questions.cn: 汉语的母语人口最多，超过了十亿人。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：nat-（出生）+ -ive（形容词后缀）→ 出生地的，本地的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Chinese has the largest number of ____ speakers, over one billion people. (提示: 本地的，出生的)

questions.meaning: adj. 出生地的；本地的；土著的 n. 本地人
questions.context_sentence: Chinese has the largest number of native speakers, over one billion people.
questions.cn: 汉语的母语人口最多，超过了十亿人。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：nat-（出生）+ -ive（形容词后缀）→ 出生地的，本地的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“native”的最佳中文释义：

questions.context_sentence: What is the attitude of the speaker towards foreign language learning?
questions.cn: 发言者对学习外语的态度是什么？
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“矮踢兔”，个子矮的人踢兔子，这态度可不好。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the ____ of the speaker towards foreign language learning? (提示: 态度)

questions.context_sentence: What is the attitude of the speaker towards foreign language learning?
questions.cn: 发言者对学习外语的态度是什么？
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“矮踢兔”，个子矮的人踢兔子，这态度可不好。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“n. 态度；看法”对应的英文单词：

questions.context_sentence: Pronouns refer to something or somebody mentioned earlier.
questions.cn: 代词指称前面提到的某事或某人。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：refer（参考）+ -ence（名词后缀）→ 参考，指称。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“reference”的最佳中文释义：

questions.meaning: vi. 提到；参考；查阅 vt. 查询；叫……求助于
questions.context_sentence: What do the italicised words refer to in the sentences?
questions.cn: 句子中斜体字指的是什么？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：re-（再）+ fer（带来）→ 再次带来信息供参考 → 提到，查阅。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What do the italicised words ____ to in the sentences? (提示: 指的是；提到)

questions.meaning: phrase 指的是；描述；提到；查阅
questions.context_sentence: What do the italicised words refer to in the sentences?
questions.cn: 句子中斜体字指的是什么？
questions.hint: 短语记忆：refer 与 to 连用，表示“提到”或“指的是”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What do the italicised words ____ in the sentences? (提示: 指的是；提到)

questions.context_sentence: There are many reasons why this has been possible, but one of the main factors has been the Chinese writing system.
questions.cn: 这之所以成为可能，有很多原因，但主要因素之一是汉字书写体系。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sys（赛死）+ tem（特闷）→ 比赛中规则太死，制度太闷 → 体系，制度。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: There are many reasons why this has been possible, but one of the main factors has been the Chinese writing ____. (提示: 体系；系统)

questions.context_sentence: China is widely known for its ancient civilisation which has continued all the way through into modern times, despite the many ups and downs in its history.
questions.cn: 中国以其历史悠久的古代文明而闻名于世，尽管其历史上经历了许多起伏，但这一文明一直延续到现代。
questions.hint: 拆分记忆：de（向下）+ spite（恶意）→ 不管别人的恶意 → 尽管，即使。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: China is widely known for its ancient civilisation which has continued all the way through into modern times, ____ the many ups and downs in its history. (提示: 尽管；即使)

questions.context_sentence: China is widely known for its ancient civilisation which has continued all the way through into modern times, despite the many ups and downs in its history.
questions.cn: 中国以其历史悠久的古代文明而闻名于世，尽管其历史上经历了许多起伏，但这一文明一直延续到现代。
questions.hint: 拆分记忆：de（向下）+ spite（恶意）→ 不管别人的恶意 → 尽管，即使。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“prep. 即使；尽管”对应的英文单词：

questions.context_sentence: China is widely known for its ancient civilisation which has continued all the way through into modern times, despite the many ups and downs in its history.
questions.cn: 中国以其历史悠久的古代文明而闻名于世，尽管其历史上经历了许多起伏，但这一文明一直延续到现代。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：up（上）and down（下）→ 起起落落 → 兴衰，浮沉。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: China is widely known for its ancient civilisation which has continued into modern times, despite the many ____ in its history. (提示: 起伏；兴衰)

questions.context_sentence: There are many reasons why this has been possible, but one of the main factors has been the Chinese writing system.
questions.cn: 这之所以成为可能，有很多原因，但主要因素之一是汉字书写体系。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：fact（做）+ -or（事物）→ 做出某事的东西 → 因素，要素。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: There are many reasons why this has been possible, but one of the main ____ has been the Chinese writing system. (提示: 因素)

questions.meaning: adj. 以（某事）为基础的；以……为重要部分（或特征）的
questions.context_sentence: At the beginning, written Chinese was a picture-based language.
questions.cn: 起初，汉字是一种以图画为基础的语言。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：base（基础）+ -ed（形容词后缀）→ 有基础的 → 以……为基础的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: At the beginning, written Chinese was a picture-____ language. (提示: 以……为基础的)

questions.meaning: vt. 以……为据点；以……为基础 n. 底部；根据
questions.context_sentence: The writer bases his argument on facts.
questions.cn: 作者把他的论点建立在事实的基础上。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：爸爸(ba)色(se)衰，失去了家里的经济“基础”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The writer ____ his argument on facts. (提示: 将……建立在……基础上)

questions.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu.
questions.cn: 这可以追溯到几千年前使用龙骨的时期。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：date（日期）+ back（往回）→ 日期往回数 → 追溯到。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It ____ several thousand years to the use of longgu. (提示: 追溯到)

questions.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal bones and shells.
questions.cn: 这可以追溯到几千年前使用龙骨的时期——动物骨头和甲壳。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“波恩”，波恩的骨头硬。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal ____ and shells. (提示: 骨头)

questions.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal bones and shells.
questions.cn: 这可以追溯到几千年前使用龙骨的时期——动物骨头和甲壳。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sh（沙滩上）+ ell（看成egg，蛋的）→ 沙滩上的蛋壳 → 贝壳，壳。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“shell”的最佳中文释义：

questions.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal bones and shells on which symbols were carved.
questions.cn: 这可以追溯到几千年前使用龙骨的时期——动物骨头和甲壳，上面刻有符号。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sym（什么）+ bol（波罗）→ 什么是菠萝的“象征”？
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal bones and shells on which ____ were carved. (提示: 符号)

questions.context_sentence: These were animal bones and shells on which symbols were carved by ancient Chinese people.
questions.cn: 这些是古代中国人刻有符号的动物骨头和甲壳。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：car（小汽车）+ ve（看成剪刀的形状）→ 用剪刀在车上“雕刻”图案。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: These were animal bones and shells on which symbols were ____ by ancient Chinese people. (提示: 雕刻)

questions.context_sentence: By the Shang Dynasty, these symbols had become a well-developed writing system.
questions.cn: 到了商代，这些符号已发展成为一个成熟的书写体系。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：dy（第一）+ nasty（肮脏的）→ 历史上很多王朝(dynasty)的开端都充满了肮脏的政治阴谋。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: By the Shang ____, these symbols had become a well-developed writing system. (提示: 朝代)

questions.meaning: n. （植物、语言等的）变体；异体；多样化
questions.context_sentence: Over the years, the system developed into different forms, as it was a time when people were divided geographically, leading to many varieties of dialects and characters.
questions.cn: 多年来，该体系发展成不同的形式，因为当时人们在地理上是分裂的，导致了许多方言和文字的变体。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：vary（变化）+ -ety（名词后缀，表状态）→ 多样化，变体。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Over the years, the system developed into different forms, leading to many ____ of dialects. (提示: 变体；多样化)

questions.meaning: adj. 主要的；重要的；大的 n. 主修课程 vt. & vi. 主修
questions.context_sentence: Emperor Qinshihuang united the seven major states into one unified country.
questions.cn: 秦始皇将七个主要国家统一为一个国家。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：ma（妈妈）+ jor（卓）→ 卓尔不群的妈妈在家里是“主要的”话事人。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Emperor Qinshihuang united the seven ____ states into one unified country. (提示: 主要的)

questions.context_sentence: Even today, no matter where Chinese people live or what dialect they speak, they can all still communicate in writing.
questions.cn: 即使在今天，无论中国人生活在哪里，说什么方言，他们仍然可以通过书面进行交流。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：no（没有）+ matter（麻烦、事情）→ 没关系，不管怎样 → 不论，不管。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Even today, ____ where Chinese people live, they can all still communicate in writing. (提示: 不管；不论)

questions.context_sentence: Even today, no matter where Chinese people live or what dialect they speak, they can all still communicate in writing.
questions.cn: 即使在今天，无论中国人生活在哪里，说什么方言，他们仍然可以通过书面进行交流。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：dia-（穿过，两者之间）+ lect（说话）→ 两个地方之间特有的说话方式 → 方言。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Even today, no matter what ____ they speak, they can all still communicate in writing. (提示: 方言)

questions.context_sentence: Written Chinese has also become an important means by which China's present is connected with its past.
questions.cn: 汉字也已成为连接中国现在与过去的重要手段。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：mean（意味着）+ s（复数）→ 意味着达成目标的东西 → 方法，手段。单复数同形。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Written Chinese has also become an important ____ by which China's present is connected with its past. (提示: 方式；方法)

questions.meaning: adj. 传统的；最优秀的；典型的 n. 经典作品；名著
questions.context_sentence: People in modern times can read the classic works which were written by Chinese in ancient times.
questions.cn: 现代人能够阅读中国古代人写的经典著作。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：class（班级、等级）+ -ic（形容词后缀）→ 有等级的，一流的 → 经典的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: People in modern times can read the ____ works which were written by Chinese in ancient times. (提示: 经典的)

questions.meaning: n. 尊重；关注 vt. 把……视为；看待
questions.context_sentence: The high regard for the Chinese writing system can be seen in the development of Chinese characters as an art form.
questions.cn: 对汉字书写体系的高度重视表现在汉字作为一种艺术形式的发展上。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：re（反复）+ gard（看作guard看守，关注）→ 反复关注 → 尊重，看待。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The high ____ for the Chinese writing system can be seen in the development of Chinese characters. (提示: 尊重；重视)

questions.meaning: n. 文字；符号；角色；品质；特点
questions.context_sentence: The development of Chinese characters as an art form, known as Chinese calligraphy.
questions.cn: 汉字作为一种艺术形式的发展，被称为中国书法。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：char（茶）+ ac（客）+ ter（特）→ 喝茶的客人很有特点(character)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The development of Chinese ____ as an art form, known as Chinese calligraphy. (提示: 汉字；文字)

questions.context_sentence: The development of Chinese characters as an art form, known as Chinese calligraphy.
questions.cn: 汉字作为一种艺术形式的发展，被称为中国书法。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：calli-（美丽的）+ graphy（写，画）→ 美丽的写字艺术 → 书法。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“n. 书法；书法艺术”对应的英文单词：

questions.context_sentence: As China plays a greater role in global affairs, an increasing number of international students are beginning to appreciate China's culture.
questions.cn: 随着中国在全球事务中发挥更大作用，越来越多的留学生开始欣赏中国的文化。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：globe（地球）+ -al（形容词后缀）→ 全球的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: As China plays a greater role in ____ affairs, an increasing number of international students are beginning to appreciate China's culture. (提示: 全球的)

questions.meaning: n. 公共事务；事件；关系
questions.context_sentence: As China plays a greater role in global affairs, an increasing number of international students are beginning to appreciate China's culture.
questions.cn: 随着中国在全球事务中发挥更大作用，越来越多的留学生开始欣赏中国的文化。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：af（阿飞）+ fair（公平的）→ 阿飞处理事情很公平 → 事务，事件。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: As China plays a greater role in global ____, an increasing number of international students are beginning to appreciate China's culture. (提示: 事务；事件)

questions.meaning: vt. 欣赏；重视；感激；领会 vi. 增值
questions.context_sentence: As China plays a greater role in global affairs, an increasing number of international students are beginning to appreciate China's culture.
questions.cn: 随着中国在全球事务中发挥更大作用，越来越多的留学生开始欣赏中国的文化。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：ap-（加强）+ preci（价值，price）+ -ate（动词后缀）→ 给予应有的价值 → 欣赏，感激。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: As China plays a greater role in global affairs, an increasing number of international students are beginning to ____ China's culture. (提示: 欣赏；感激)

questions.meaning: adj. 特定的；明确的；具体的
questions.context_sentence: Scanning is looking at the text quickly to find specific information, such as dates or numbers.
questions.cn: 寻读是快速浏览文本以寻找特定信息，例如日期或数字。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：speci（外观，种类）+ -fic（使……的）→ 归入特定种类的 → 特定的，具体的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Scanning is looking at the text quickly to find ____ information, such as dates or numbers. (提示: 特定的；具体的)

questions.context_sentence: It is believed that Chinese calligraphy dates back to at least the Han Dynasty (202 BCE-220 CE).
questions.cn: 人们认为中国书法至少可以追溯到汉朝（公元前202年至公元220年）。
questions.hint: 缩写记忆：Common Era 的缩写，意为“公元”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It is believed that Chinese calligraphy dates back to at least the Han Dynasty (202 BCE-220 ____). (提示: 公元)

questions.meaning: n. & vi. 斗争；奋斗；搏斗
questions.context_sentence: When I started studying German, it was a struggle.
questions.cn: 当我开始学习德语时，那是一件很吃力的事（一番挣扎）。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“死拽狗”，和疯狗搏斗，真是辛苦的“挣扎/奋斗”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“struggle”的最佳中文释义：
options: n. & vi. 斗争；挣扎；奋斗
n. & vi. 微笑；喜形于色

questions.context_sentence: The words felt strange on my tongue, and the grammar would not stay in my head.
questions.cn: 这些单词在我的舌尖上感觉很陌生，语法也记不住在脑子里。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：ton（吨）+ gue（姑额）→ 舌头重达一吨，感觉说不出话 → 舌头，语言。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The words felt strange on my ____, and the grammar would not stay in my head. (提示: 舌头；发音)

questions.context_sentence: I could see the world from a different point of view.
questions.cn: 我可以从不同的角度来看世界。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：point（点）+ of view（看）→ 观察的立足点 → 观点，视角。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I could see the world from a different ____. (提示: 观点；看法)

questions.context_sentence: What are the two pairs of words that the student is confused by? Tick them: semester / term.
questions.cn: 这个学生对哪两组单词感到困惑？勾选它们：学期/学期。
questions.hint: 拆分记忆：se（色）+ mes（霉）+ ter（特）→ 这个“学期”的脸色特霉。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What are the two pairs of words that the student is confused by? Tick them: ____ / term. (提示: 学期)

questions.context_sentence: British English uses petrol while American English uses gas.
questions.cn: 英国英语使用petrol，而美国英语使用gas。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：petr-（石头）+ ol（油）→ 从石头（石油）里提炼出来的油 → 汽油。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: British English uses ____ while American English uses gas. (提示: 汽油)

questions.context_sentence: The subway in New York is very busy.
questions.cn: 纽约的地铁非常拥挤。
questions.hint: 前缀记忆：sub-（在……下面）+ way（路）→ 地底下的路 → 地铁。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The ____ in New York is very busy. (提示: 地铁)

questions.context_sentence: They live in a beautiful apartment in the city center.
questions.cn: 他们住在市中心一套漂亮的公寓里。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：apart（分开）+ -ment（名词后缀）→ 分开隔成独立套间的住宅 → 公寓套房。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: They live in a beautiful ____ in the city center. (提示: 公寓)

questions.context_sentence: He bought a new pair of pants yesterday.
questions.cn: 他昨天买了一条新裤子。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：pan（平底锅）+ ts（复数）→ 穿着裤子坐在平底锅上。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: He bought a new pair of ____ yesterday. (提示: 裤子)

questions.context_sentence: I beg your pardon?
questions.cn: 请您再说一遍好吗？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：beg 和 big 只有一个字母不同，乞求(beg)得到一个大(big)包。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I ____ your pardon? (提示: 恳求；请求)

questions.meaning: n. 同等的人；相等物 adj. 相同的；同样的
questions.context_sentence: Our relationship is close and we're equals.
questions.cn: 我们关系亲密，而且我们是平等的。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“一口”，大家分得同样一口饭，说明是平等的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Our relationship is close and we're ____. (提示: 平等的人)

questions.context_sentence: I only need a few words to bridge the gap between us.
questions.cn: 我只需要说几个字来消除我们之间的隔阂（缩小差距）。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：g（哥）+ ap（一张扑克牌）→ 哥俩之间有一张扑克牌的“差距”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I only need a few words to bridge the ____ between us. (提示: 差距；隔阂)

questions.meaning: n. 要求；需求 vt. 强烈要求；需要
questions.context_sentence: I must make my request longer—and I must make it a question, not a demand.
questions.cn: 我必须把我的请求说长一点——我必须用提问的口气，而不是生硬的命令（要求）。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：de-（加强）+ mand（命令）→ 强制命令 → 强烈要求。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I must make my request longer—and I must make it a question, not a ____. (提示: 强硬的要求)

questions.context_sentence: For me, vocabulary is my biggest problem.
questions.cn: 对我来说，词汇是我最大的问题。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：voc-（声音，言语）+ -abulary → 所有的词语汇聚在一起 → 词汇。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“n. 词汇”对应的英文单词：

questions.context_sentence: Does the writer give a clear description of the problem?
questions.cn: 作者对这个问题给出了清晰的描述吗？
questions.hint: 词根记忆：de-（向下）+ script（写）+ -ion（名词后缀）→ 写下来的东西 → 描写，形容。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Does the writer give a clear ____ of the problem? (提示: 描写；形容)

questions.context_sentence: Does each sentence relate to the main idea?
questions.cn: 每个句子都和中心思想相关吗？
questions.hint: 词根记忆：re-（回）+ lat-（带来）→ 重新带回来做联系 → 联系，讲述。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Does each sentence ____ to the main idea? (提示: 与……相关；联系)

questions.context_sentence: I just didn't feel that it related to my daily life in any way.
questions.cn: 我只是觉得它和我的日常生活没有任何关系。
questions.hint: 短语记忆：relate 与 to 连用，表示“与……相关”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I just didn't feel that it ____ my daily life in any way. (提示: 与……相关)

questions.context_sentence: Around 2.8 billion people speak the six official languages of the United Nations.
questions.cn: 全球大约有28亿人使用联合国的六种官方语言。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：united（联合的）+ nations（国家）→ 联合起来的国家 → 联合国。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Around 2.8 billion people speak the six official languages of the ____. (提示: 联合国)

questions.context_sentence: Chinese has the largest number of native speakers, over one billion people.
questions.cn: 汉语的母语人口最多，超过了十亿人。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：native（本地的，出生地的）+ speaker（说话者）→ 使用本国/本地语言的人 → 母语者。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Chinese has the largest number of ____, over one billion people. (提示: 母语者)

questions.context_sentence: Every little step makes progress.
questions.cn: 迈出的每一小步都会取得进步。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：make（做，制造）+ progress（进步，前进）→ 取得进步。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Every little step ____. (提示: 取得进步；取得成果)

questions.context_sentence: Listening to English radio programmes helps me get used to how fast native speakers talk.
questions.cn: 听英语广播节目能帮我习惯英语母语者说话的速度。
questions.hint: 短语记忆：get used to + n./doing，意为“变得习惯于……”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Listening to English radio programmes helps me ____ how fast native speakers talk. (提示: 习惯于)

questions.context_sentence: I told my mum that I wanted to give up.
questions.cn: 我告诉我妈妈我想放弃。
questions.hint: 短语记忆：give（给）+ up（向上）→ 把手举起来投降 → 放弃。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I told my mum that I wanted to ____. (提示: 放弃)

questions.meaning: phrase 缩小差距；消除隔阂
questions.context_sentence: I only need a few words to bridge the gap between us.
questions.cn: 我只需要说几个字来消除我们之间的隔阂。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：bridge（架桥于……）+ the gap（差距，沟壑）→ 在鸿沟上架起桥梁 → 缩小差距，消除隔阂。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I only need a few words to ____ between us. (提示: 消除隔阂；架起沟通桥梁)

questions.meaning: phrase 理顺；整理；保持清楚
questions.context_sentence: I can't keep all the new vocabulary straight in my head.
questions.cn: 我脑子里没办法把所有的新词汇整理得井井有条。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：keep（保持）+ straight（笔直，清楚）→ 保持思路笔直不乱 → 理顺，搞清楚。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I can't keep all the new vocabulary ____ in my head. (提示: 保持条理清晰；理顺)

questions.meaning: phrase 开始学习；承担；呈现
questions.context_sentence: That was the day I decided to take on a new language.
questions.cn: 那就是我决定开始学习一门新语言的那一天。
questions.hint: 短语记忆：take（拿）+ on（在……上）→ 把任务/语言拿到自己身上 → 承担，开始学习。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: That was the day I decided to ____ a new language. (提示: 承接；开始学习)

questions.context_sentence: Around 2.8 billion people speak the six official languages of the United Nations.
questions.cn: 全球大约有28亿人使用联合国的六种官方语言。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：b (billion) 与 m (million，百万) 相对，b代表十亿，数字更大。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“billion”的最佳中文释义：

questions.meaning: adj. 出生地的；本地 of n. 本地人
questions.context_sentence: Chinese has the largest number of native speakers, over one billion people.
questions.cn: 汉语的母语人口最多，超过了十亿人。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：nat-（出生）+ -ive（形容词后缀）→ 出生地的，本地的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“adj. 出生地的；本地的”对应的英文单词：

questions.context_sentence: What is the attitude of the speaker towards foreign language learning?
questions.cn: 发言者对学习外语的态度是什么？
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“矮踢兔”，个子矮的人踢兔子，这态度可不好。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“attitude”的最佳中文释义：

questions.context_sentence: Pronouns refer to something or somebody mentioned earlier.
questions.cn: 代词指称前面提到的某事或某人。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：refer（参考）+ -ence（名词后缀）→ 参考，指称。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“n. 指称关系；参考”对应的英文单词：

questions.meaning: vi. 提到；参考；查阅 vt. 查询；叫……求助于
questions.context_sentence: What do the italicised words refer to in the sentences?
questions.cn: 句子中斜体字指的是什么？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：re-（再）+ fer（带来）→ 再次带来信息供参考 → 提到，查阅。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“refer”的最佳中文释义：

questions.meaning: phrase 指的是；描述；提到；查阅
questions.context_sentence: What do the italicised words refer to in the sentences?
questions.cn: 句子中斜体字指的是什么？
questions.hint: 短语记忆：refer 与 to 连用，表示“提到”或“指的是”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文短语“refer to”的最佳中文释义：
options: phrase 指的是；描述；提到；查阅

questions.context_sentence: There are many reasons why this has been possible, but one of the main factors has been the Chinese writing system.
questions.cn: 这之所以成为可能，有很多原因，但主要因素之一是汉字书写体系。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sys（赛死）+ tem（特闷）→ 比赛中规则太死，制度太闷 → 体系，制度。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“n. 体系；制度；系统”对应的英文单词：

questions.context_sentence: China is widely known for its ancient civilisation which has continued all the way through into modern times, despite the many ups and downs in its history.
questions.cn: 中国以其历史悠久的古代文明而闻名于世，尽管其历史上经历了许多起伏，但这一文明一直延续到现代。
questions.hint: 拆分记忆：de（向下）+ spite（恶意）→ 不管别人的恶意 → 尽管，即使。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“despite”的最佳中文释义：

questions.context_sentence: China is widely known for its ancient civilisation which has continued all the way through into modern times, despite the many ups and downs in its history.
questions.cn: 中国以其历史悠久的古代文明而闻名于世，尽管其历史上经历了许多起伏，但这一文明一直延续到现代。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：up（上）and down（下）→ 起起落落 → 兴衰，浮沉。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“phrase 浮沉；兴衰；荣辱”对应的英文短语：

questions.context_sentence: There are many reasons why this has been possible, but one of the main factors has been the Chinese writing system.
questions.cn: 这之所以成为可能，有很多原因，但主要因素之一是汉字书写体系。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：fact（做）+ -or（事物）→ 做出某事的东西 → 因素，要素。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“n. 因素；要素”对应的英文单词：

questions.meaning: adj. 以（某事）为基础的；以……为重要部分（或特征）的
questions.context_sentence: At the beginning, written Chinese was a picture-based language.
questions.cn: 起初，汉字是一种以图画为基础的语言。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：base（基础）+ -ed（形容词后缀）→ 有基础的 → 以……为基础的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“based”的最佳中文释义：
options: adj. 以（某事）为基础的；以……为重要部分（或特征）的

questions.meaning: vt. 以……为据点；以……为基础 n. 底部；根据
questions.context_sentence: The writer bases his argument on facts.
questions.cn: 作者把他的论点建立在事实的基础上。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：爸爸(ba)色(se)衰，失去了家里的经济“基础”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“base”的最佳中文释义：
options: n. 基础；底部；根据 vt. 以……为基础

questions.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu.
questions.cn: 这可以追溯到几千年前使用龙骨的时期。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：date（日期）+ back（往回）→ 日期往回数 → 追溯到。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文短语“date back”的最佳中文释义：

questions.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal bones and shells.
questions.cn: 这可以追溯到几千年前使用龙骨的时期——动物骨头和甲壳。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“波恩”，波恩的骨头硬。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“n. 骨头；骨（质）”对应的英文单词：

questions.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal bones and shells.
questions.cn: 这可以追溯到几千年前使用龙骨的时期——动物骨头和甲壳。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sh（沙滩上）+ ell（看成egg，蛋的）→ 沙滩上的蛋壳 → 贝壳，壳。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“n. 壳；壳状物”对应的英文单词：

questions.context_sentence: It dates back several thousand years to the use of longgu—animal bones and shells on which symbols were carved.
questions.cn: 这可以追溯到几千年前使用龙骨的时期——动物骨头和甲壳，上面刻有符号。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sym（什么）+ bol（波罗）→ 什么是菠萝的“象征”？
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“symbol”的最佳中文释义：

questions.context_sentence: These were animal bones and shells on which symbols were carved by ancient Chinese people.
questions.cn: 这些是古代中国人刻有符号的动物骨头和甲壳。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：car（小汽车）+ ve（看成剪刀 of 形状）→ 用剪刀在车上“雕刻”图案。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“vt. & vi. 雕刻”对应的英文单词：

questions.context_sentence: By the Shang Dynasty, these symbols had become a well-developed writing system.
questions.cn: 到了商代，这些符号已发展成为一个成熟的书写体系。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：dy（第一）+ nasty（肮脏的）→ 历史上很多王朝(dynasty)的开端都充满了肮脏的政治阴谋。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“dynasty”的最佳中文释义：

questions.meaning: n. （植物、语言等的）变体；异体；多样化
questions.context_sentence: Over the years, the system developed into different forms, leading to many varieties of dialects and characters.
questions.cn: 多年来，该体系发展成不同的形式，导致了许多方言和文字的变体。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：vary（变化）+ -ety（名词后缀，表状态）→ 多样化，变体。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“variety”的最佳中文释义：
options: n. （植物、语言等的）变体；异体；多样化

questions.meaning: adj. 主要的；重要的；大的 n. 主修课程 vt. & vi. 主修
questions.context_sentence: Emperor Qinshihuang united the seven major states into one unified country.
questions.cn: 秦始皇将七个主要国家统一为一个国家。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：ma（妈妈）+ jor（卓）→ 卓尔不群的妈妈在家里是“主要的”话事人。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出与中文“adj. 主要的；重要的”对应的英文单词：

questions.context_sentence: Even today, no matter where Chinese people live or what dialect they speak, they can all still communicate in writing.
questions.cn: 即使在今天，无论中国人生活在哪里，说什么方言，他们仍然可以通过书面进行交流。
questions.hint: 字面记忆：no（没有）+ matter（麻烦、事情）→ 没关系，不管怎样 → 不论，不管。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文短语“no matter”的最佳中文释义：

questions.context_sentence: Even today, no matter where Chinese people live or what dialect they speak, they can all still communicate in writing.
questions.cn: 即使在今天，无论中国人生活在哪里，说什么方言，他们仍然可以通过书面进行交流。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：dia-（穿过，两者之间）+ lect（说话）→ 两个地方之间特有的说话方式 → 方言。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“dialect”的最佳中文释义：

questions.context_sentence: Written Chinese has also become an important means by which China's present is connected with its past.
questions.cn: 汉字也已成为连接中国现在与过去的重要手段。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：mean（意味着）+ s（复数）→ 意味着达成目标的东西 → 方法，手段。单复数同形。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“means”的最佳中文释义：

questions.meaning: adj. 传统的；最优秀的；典型的 n. 经典作品；名著
questions.context_sentence: People in modern times can read the classic works which were written by Chinese in ancient times.
questions.cn: 现代人能够阅读中国古代人写的经典著作。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：class (班级、等级) + -ic (形容词后缀) → 有等级的，一流的 → 经典的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“classic”的最佳中文释义：
options: adj. 优秀的；经典的 n. 经典之作

questions.meaning: n. 尊重；关注 vt. 把……视为；看待
questions.context_sentence: The high regard for the Chinese writing system can be seen in the development of Chinese characters as an art form.
questions.cn: 对汉字书写体系的高度重视表现在汉字作为一种艺术形式的发展上。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：re（反复）+ gard（看作guard看守，关注）→ 反复关注 → 尊重，看待。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“regard”的最佳中文释义：
options: n. 尊重；关注 vt. 把……视为
n. 报酬；回报 vt. 报答
n. 记录；记载 vt. 记录
n. 报告；汇报 vt. 报告
n. 结果；成果 vi. 导致
n. 要求；请求 vt. 要求

questions.meaning: n. 文字；符号；角色；品质；特点
questions.context_sentence: The development of Chinese characters as an art form, known as Chinese calligraphy.
questions.cn: 汉字作为一种艺术形式的发展，被称为中国书法。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：char（茶）+ ac（客）+ ter（特）→ 喝茶的客人很有特点(character)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“character”的最佳中文释义：
options: n. 文字；符号；特点；角色

questions.context_sentence: The development of Chinese characters as an art form, known as Chinese calligraphy.
questions.cn: 汉字作为一种艺术形式的发展，被称为中国书法。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：calli-（美丽的）+ graphy（写，画）→ 美丽的写字艺术 → 书法。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“calligraphy”的最佳中文释义：

questions.context_sentence: As China plays a greater role in global affairs, an increasing number of international students are beginning to appreciate China's culture.
questions.cn: 随着中国在全球事务中发挥更大作用，越来越多的留学生开始欣赏中国的文化。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：globe（地球）+ -al（形容词后缀）→ 全球的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“global”的最佳中文释义：

questions.meaning: n. 公共事务；事件；关系
questions.context_sentence: As China plays a greater role in global affairs, an increasing number of international students are beginning to appreciate China's culture.
questions.cn: 随着中国在全球事务中发挥更大作用，越来越多的留学生开始欣赏中国的文化。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：af（阿飞）+ fair（公平的）→ 阿飞处理事情很公平 → 事务，事件。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“affair”的最佳中文释义：
options: n. 影响；效果 vt. 影响
n. 报价；提议 vt. 提供
n. 公共事务；事件；私人业务

questions.meaning: vt. 欣赏；重视；感激；领会 vi. 增值
questions.context_sentence: As China plays a greater role in global affairs, an increasing number of international students are beginning to appreciate China's culture.
questions.cn: 随着中国在全球事务中发挥更大作用，越来越多的留学生开始欣赏中国的文化。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：ap-（加强）+ preci（价值，price）+ -ate（动词后缀）→ 给予应有的价值 → 欣赏，感激。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 请选出英文单词“appreciate”的最佳中文释义：
options: vt. 拨款；拨出 adj. 适当的
vt. 欣赏；感激；领会；重视
